message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User1
participant "User" as User2
participant "DocumentationWidget" as DocWidget
participant "IndexAbstractor" as IndexAbstractor

User1 ..> DocWidget : search
DocWidget ..> IndexAbstractor : search(term)
IndexAbstractor ..> DocWidget : return results
DocWidget ..> User2 : display results

@enduml
